strengths: ~17 years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure, and DevOps — satisfies the minimum tenure requirement
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and builder instinct: founded GISCollective, contributed to multiple startups (WatchUp, Apon), and maintains several open-source projects
Active knowledge-sharer with public conference talks and multi-day workshops, aligning with the role's expectation to inspire internal and external audiences
concerns: AI experience is extremely nascent — limited to approximately 14 months of MCP tooling and agentic workflow work at re:cinq, with no demonstrated AI products or platforms built and shipped at scale
No advanced degree in an AI-related field; both degrees (CS and Fine Arts/Photography) are unrelated to the preferred academic profile for an AI strategy principal
Career trajectory remains at the senior/staff practitioner level with no evidence of director-level strategic advising, executive partnership, or influence over organizational AI or cloud strategy
response.justification: Bogdan brings a genuinely broad 17-year engineering career with meaningful breadth across stacks and platforms, real entrepreneurial initiative, and a credible record of community knowledge-sharing — all qualities the role values. However, his AI engagement is too recent and too shallow (MCP tooling since April 2025) to constitute the recognized, demonstrated AI expertise a Director-level AI Strategy principal requires. His roles have consistently been individual practitioner or small-team contributor positions, with no evidence of the strategic customer advisory, cross-organizational influence, or executive-level partnership the job description centers. The gap between his current trajectory and the seniority, AI depth, and strategic scope of this role is substantial.
